2606.24433.title: MedPCFM: Improving Medical Point Cloud Completion by Integrating Point Transformers and Flow Matching
2606.24433.paper_summary: Medical point cloud completion is important for anatomical reconstruction and downstream clinical workflows, yet generative modeling in this setting remains insufficiently studied. We investigate completion through continuous-time generative modeling and introduce PCFM, a PTv3-backed flow matching approach for medical point cloud completion. We evaluate on SkullFix and SkullBreak, and additionally on the more recent Mandibular Defect dataset. We build strong baselines by adapting PTv3 to a deterministic encoder-decoder completion model and by instantiating diffusion completion (PCDiff) with both PVCNN and PTv3 denoisers. PCFM with PTv3 is competitive with the deterministic PTv3 baseline and achieves state-of-the-art generative performance across datasets, while requiring substantially fewer sampling steps than diffusion. At the best operating points, PTv3 also yields clear throughput gains, providing up to a 7$\times$ speed-up for PCFM compared to a PVCNN backbone. Finally, we study empirical scaling trends by varying model size and point cardinality, showing consistent gains with higher point resolution and informative trade-offs across model scales.
2606.24433.paper_summary_zh: 醫療點雲補全對於解剖重建和下游臨床工作流程非常重要，但在這一領域的生成建模仍然研究不足。我們通過連續時間生成建模來研究補全，並介紹了PCFM，一種基於PTv3的流匹配方法，用於醫療點雲補全。我們在SkullFix和SkullBreak上進行評估，並額外在較新的下頜缺損數據集上進行評估。我們通過將PTv3適配到確定性編碼-解碼補全模型以及通過用PVCNN和PTv3去噪器實例化擴散補全（PCDiff）來建立強基準。使用PTv3的PCFM在確定性PTv3基準上具有競爭力，並在各數據集上實現了最先進的生成性能，同時所需的取樣步驟顯著少於擴散。在最佳操作點上，PTv3還顯示出明顯的吞吐量增益，為PCFM提供了與PVCNN骨幹相比高達7$\times$的加速。最後，我們通過改變模型大小和點數量來研究實證擴展趨勢，顯示出隨著點解析度的提高和模型規模之間的信息權衡，始終獲得一致的增益。
2606.24433.author: Kamil Kwarciak et.al.
